summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ScanSavvy static site messaging updates. All 10 required features successfully implemented and tested.
passed_tests: QR code graphic displays prominently in hero section with 'Scan Once, Save Smarter' tagline
Hero headline correctly shows 'Smart Savings, Sent to You'
Hero subheadline mentions favorite stores/brands and automatic deal delivery
Value proposition banner shows 'Choose what you care about. Let ScanSavvy do the work.'

Features section contains all 6 consumer-friendly features (Personalized Deal Matching, Daily & Weekly Deal Pushes, Favorite Store & Brand Tracking, Instant QR & Coupon Access, Smart Notifications, Easy Savings Dashboard)
How It Works section has correct 3-step flow (Choose Your Favorites, Receive Matched Deals, Save With Less Effort)
Pricing section shows correct affordable pricing: Free ($0), Premium ($3.99), Family ($5.99)
CTA button in navigation correctly says 'Get My Deals'
All navigation links are functional and clickable
Responsive design works properly on mobile devices with nav links hidden and content stacking correctly
